description_long: This house features a stone exterior with a prominent red-tiled gable roof and wooden structural accents. The front facade displays tall, narrow windows with a grid pattern, a wooden door, and a covered porch supported by columns adorned with potted plants. A staircase leads to an upper-level entrance, and the ground floor includes an outdoor seating area with tables and chairs, partially enclosed by a green hedge wall. The side and rear walls are mostly solid stone, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall design evokes a rustic, European-inspired aesthetic with a blend of natural materials and decorative greenery.
description: A rustic stone house with a red-tiled gable roof, tall windows, a wooden staircase, and a covered porch with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tall windows, covered porch with columns, potted plants, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid stone wall, hedge enclosure, and the edge of the porch with visible columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly windowless stone wall, the tiled roof, and the hedge extending from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the wooden staircase leading to the upper entrance, porch columns, and vertical window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: vertical strips with symmetrical rows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door accessed by steps, covered porch with columns, potted plants, and decorative signage
